checks.name: run-anchor
checks.detail: Ledger entry, frozen prompt hashes, and content hash are present.

checks.name: scope-isolation
checks.detail: Existing single-app cohort has no per-run branch/worktree ref; run folder and shared baseline are recorded for review.

checks.name: dependency-policy
checks.detail: No dependency or lockfile additions were found in the existing cohort state.

checks.name: content-integrity
checks.detail: Benchmark content mode is fixtures; there is no shared static content manifest to mutate.

checks.name: protected-baseline
checks.detail: The configured protected baseline paths are unchanged relative to the recorded cohort baseline.

checks.name: repository-health
checks.detail: Typecheck and lint pass. The shared Next.js build has pre-existing CSS-module purity errors in excluded routes; this is recorded as a warning for the interim cohort.

checks.name: rendering
checks.detail: Route returned HTTP 200 from the local Next.js dev server; global console errors are isolated to excluded routes.

checks.name: interaction-probes
checks.detail: Static responsive captures were collected; no benchmark-specific interaction script was configured.

checks.name: style-leakage
checks.detail: No separate leakage probe was configured; retained for reviewer visibility.
